low.summary: Contour evidence artifacts were untracked during the audit window.
low.resolution: Artifacts are included in the contour file list for staging and closeout.

verified_points: Scope is consistent with human-facing Russian localization.
No runtime or server-gate behavior drift was found beyond human-facing copy strings.
UI_ACTION_ALLOWLIST keys and non-copy fields remain contract-safe.
data-ui-action and ui_action identifiers remain unchanged.
Machine error code values remain unchanged.
Web UI copy is substantially Russian and keeps technical tokens where they preserve command meaning.
No CSS or design redesign was found.
Tracked changed-file scan found no private external reference-service traces.
auditor_commands_reported: rg scans for contract fields and external-reference markers
Python AST/regex comparisons for allowlist fields, command/action ids, machine codes and fixture shapes
auditor_residual_risk: Auditor did not run a live browser visual smoke independently; orchestration browser smoke is recorded separately.
orchestrator_resolution: The orchestrator ran system Google Chrome via Playwright against the local fake-runner server and recorded the passing browser smoke artifact.
